Place SDL2 header files here.

Download SDL2-devel-2.x.x-VC.zip from:
https://github.com/libsdl-org/SDL/releases/latest

Extract and copy all files from the SDL2's "include" folder to this directory.

You should have files like:
- SDL.h
- SDL_main.h
- SDL_video.h
- etc.

See SETUP_INSTRUCTIONS.md in the root folder for complete instructions.
